title: rinorea thomensis
intro: Rinorea thomensis is a plant species native to East Timor, belonging to the family Violaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Rinorea thomensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine in East Timor.
